subject: Re: Tilt series deselected with change_selection still processed
body: Thanks Warp Bot/Dimitry. It sounds like there's a couple layers here. Removing an entire tilt series is not supported (Warp Bot opened #462 for that). Removing a frame series (aka "a tilt") can be done in two ways: 1. Set UnselectManual="True" in the headmatter of warp_frameseries/*_Fractions.xml and re-run import (recommended by Warp Bot) 2. Set the boolean list <UseTilt>True...</UseTilt> in the body of warp_tiltseries/*.xml (used by Hamid's script). #1 appears to work for me (at very least the .tomostar is changed and no errors with reconstruction) repeating ts_import was the step I was missing. However, when I try #2 by manually setting some to False and then run WarpTools ts_aretomo, I get an error: Exception details: System.Exception: 49 active tilts in series, but 39 lines in /.../warp_tiltseries/tiltstack/Position_1_5/Position_1_5_aligned_Imod/Position_1_5.xf. Do you get errors when editing <UseTilt>, Hamid?
